details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.
reports/board/ directory missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and spec files. reports/audit/ exists.

moltbot/ directory exists with active Python code (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). Scripts reference moltbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py. docs/ also references moltbot paths.
